name: The Gallows Pole: This Valley Will Rise
original_name: The Gallows Pole: This Valley Will Rise
overview: Set against the backdrop of the coming industrial revolution in eighteenth century Yorkshire, the drama follows David Hartley as he assembles a gang of weavers and land-workers to embark upon a revolutionary criminal enterprise that will capsize the economy and become the biggest fraud in British history.

trailers.title: The Gallows Pole director Shane Meadows loves Martin Scorsese films │My Film Firsts with BAFTA
